description_long: This is a tall, rectangular vending machine with a predominantly white exterior and a front-facing display area. The front panel features a transparent window revealing an illuminated blue interior compartment, likely for product display or retrieval. Above the window, there is a sign labeled 'SODA MATE' along with some smaller graphics and text, indicating branding and possible instructions. To the right of the window, a vertical control panel houses a digital display, payment interface, and product selection buttons. The sides and back of the machine are plain and unadorned, with a smooth, metallic finish. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in urban public spaces.
description: A tall, white vending machine with a front display window, digital control panel, and 'SODA MATE' branding. The sides and back are plain and metallic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display window, illuminated blue interior, control panel, payment interface, and 'SODA MATE' branding.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain and featureless with a smooth metallic surface.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely plain with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view, also plain and featureless with a smooth metallic surface.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular digital display panel is located on the upper right section of the front face, vertically oriented and integrated into the control area.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the right side of the front panel, featuring a card reader and possibly a bill acceptor, both vertically aligned.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual product selection buttons is located to the right of the display window, each clearly labeled.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located below the display window on the front face, with a visible flap or door.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The branding 'SODA MATE' is prominently displayed above the display window on the front, in large, clear letters with a white background and colored accents.
